errors.meaning: Daily brief job ran successfully and generated content, but failed to deliver the message to the #daily-brief Slack channel. Job has 3 consecutive errors — all delivery failures.
errors.suggestedFix: Check the delivery target config for daily-brief job; the channel ID 'channel:C0AMSE2TW2X' may need to be verified or the Slack bot may need write access to that channel.

errors.meaning: Infrastructure daily scan ran and produced content, but failed to deliver to the #infrastructure Slack channel. Job has 1 consecutive error.
errors.suggestedFix: Check the delivery channel config for infrastructure-daily-scan; channel 'c0anlfzd1tj' / 'channel:C0ANLFZD1TJ' may need consistent formatting or the Slack bot needs channel write access.
